steps.title: Use volume scale factor for similar cubes
steps.content: For similar figures, volumes scale by the cube of the linear scale factor: $$\frac{V_A}{V_B}=k^3.$$ Plug in the given volumes: $$\frac{3375}{125}=k^3.$$

steps.title: Solve for k and match the choice
steps.content:
Compute the ratio: $$\frac{3375}{125}=27,$$ so $$k^3=27.$$ Taking the cube root gives $$k=3.$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
